## Summary

## Why

<!-- Motivation: bug to fix, missing feature, or refactor justification. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — non-functional change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore / ci — tooling, dependencies, release plumbing

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated and `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] `pyright markdown_hero/ tests/` reports zero errors and zero warnings.
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes (ruff, ruff-format, markdownlint,
      pip-audit).
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `docs/reference.md`.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Conventional Commit message used.
